title: Header Fields, Representations, Negotiation, Validators, and Caching · Program Defense
summary: A production-readiness review compares near-miss decisions for header fields, representations, negotiation, validators, and caching and requires the smallest safe representation selection and cache contract with changed-request evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for representation selection and cache contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle case-insensitive field names, repeated values, list syntax, hop-by-hop fields, size limits, and canonical map behavior without naïve splitting.
Validate request Content-Type and parameters, select an acceptable response representation, and return 415 or 406 with a documented default.
Set Content-Type, Content-Length strategy, Location, validators, Cache-Control, Vary, security fields, and trailers before committing response headers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
